name: Deli Stuffed Calzone
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine tomatoes, spinach, pepperoni, salami, mozzarella cheese, ricotta cheese, olives with pimento, Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, basil, oregano, and pepper. Set aside filling.
2. Cut each bread loaf in half.
3. On a lightly floured board, roll one bread dough half into a 12-inch circle and place on a pizza pan.
4. Spread about 1 1/3 cups of the filling onto half of the dough circle, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edge.
5. Fold the dough over the filling to make a half-circle. Press edges with a fork to seal.
6. Make three slits in the dough to allow steam to escape.
7. Repeat the process to make three more calzones.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes, brushing with olive oil.
9. Bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes or until golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.
